fato_historico: 1668: A magnitude 8.5 earthquake strikes eastern China, killing over 43,000 people.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos hums with a powerful, transformative vibration today, reminding us that even when the earth shifts beneath us, your spirit remains unyielding. Just as nature occasionally finds its balance through intense release, you may find that today is a perfect time to ground your restless Aries energy and channel your passion into something truly constructive and enduring.
frase_do_dia: True strength shines brightest when you rise above the tremors of life.
significado_numero: A symbol representing infinite strength and the cycle of cosmic restoration.
conselho: Consider grounding your intense energy by connecting deeply with the earth beneath you.
